targets.query: from(bucket: "defect_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "pcb_defect_metrics" and r["_field"] == "Total_Defective_PCBs") |> last()

from(bucket: "defect_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "pcb_defect_metrics" and r["_field"] == "Total_PCBs_Processed") |> last()
